title: Returns Dashboard and Tracking UI
objective: Add UI widget for pending returns and allow logging refunds/dismissing.
execution_steps: Add checkbox to Expense entry screen for `isReturnExpected`.
Implement confirmation dialog for dismissing return requests.
Calculate 'amount already returned' by summing linked refunds.
Handle 'More refunds follow' logic for `isReturnExpected` flag persistence.
Add undo/return icon on Timeline items.
definition_of_done: Widget displays transactions with the flag.
User can log a refund using a specific dialog pre-filled with remaining balances.
Log Refund creates a linked negative transaction and optionally clears flags.
User can dismiss the flag only after explicit confirmation via dialog.
